rationale.P01: Real prod regression: this prod e2e failure is corroborated by a surging negative pat-web-prod-regression pattern (real HTTP 500s on the live checkout flow), value 0.38 vs 0.02, never auto-resolved, and lines up AFTER the web-2026.06.24-rel deploy. Unlike the flaky e2e alerts, this reflects a genuine customer-facing web-app outage. Cardinal must-page.
rationale.P24: Downstream symptom of P01 (same pat-web-prod-regression root): synthetic checkout monitor failing on the same regression. Collapse into the web-app incident.
rationale.P02: CircleCI hourly_playwright job failure mapped to a PagerDuty incident on Platform API Staging; self-resolved in 300s with no live application degradation. CI/test-env signal, should not page prod on-call.
